creator: dgeo@centrale-med.fr
text:
Created attachment 257219
upgrade mail/sympa to 6.2.76 (git patch)

patch includes fixes for bug#275715

Version 6.2.76 only includes few critical fixes to 6.2.74

Version 6.2.74 includes a patch for CVE-2024-55919, many fixes since 6.2.72 and enhancements (no big features)

IMO this should be MFC in quarterly branch

tested with poudriere and deployed in production here.
